title: echinospermum redowskii var. tenue
intro: Echinospermum redowskii var. tenue, also known as the Korean angelica or Siberian angelica, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant's root, leaves, and seeds have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Echinospermum redowskii var. tenue include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's root is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
